nodes.label: AI as reliable information source for baking science
nodes.label_negative: AI missing nuance and failing to fact-check
nodes.grounding_span: AI seems to get general information correct but often misses nuance or doesn't take its time to fact-check itself with authoritative sources

nodes.label: AI as creative inspiration source
nodes.label_negative: AI getting stuck in a loop of predictable suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: AI will often get stuck in a loop of what it thinks I want or like, and only provide suggestions that fit that mold

nodes.label: AI as comprehensive business consultant
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to narrow tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'll plug in the recipes that I'm using / their yield. I'll plug in the cost of ingredients, any shipping fees, my time spent in labor

nodes.label: Human artistry and passion in baking
nodes.grounding_span: I can see the artistry, originality, and the passion in their work; something that is not found in an AI model

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding
nodes.grounding_span: to understand the science behind what is happening so that I can replicate it on my own

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I can see the artistry, originality, and the passion in their work

nodes.label: Business efficiency and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: help me determine the exact cost for my clients based on what I use

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've had plenty of success with it (which is why I'm comfortable continuing to use it)

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of true creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated sometimes when I feel like I've done everything I could to elicit an original (and realistic) response, but only gotten variations of the same thing over and over

nodes.label: Preference for human sources for inspiration
nodes.grounding_span: I do still prefer to hunt around for inspiration on my own

nodes.label: Strategic prompting to force critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I try to pose my questions to AI in a way that will force the model to think independently and critically before presenting its response

nodes.label: Verification through external authoritative sources
nodes.grounding_span: I'll check it against another AI / authoritative sources myself
